stemHtml: When on final approach to a contaminated runway, you experience a crosswind of 30 kt from the right and a headwind of 25 kt. Which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: Information regarding the headwind limitations can be found in part A of the operations manual.
options.b: Information regarding the headwind limitations can be found in part C of the operations manual.
options.c: Information regarding the crosswind limitations can be found in part D of the operations manual.
options.d: Information regarding the crosswind limitations can be found in part B of the operations manual.
